name: Leopard 2A7+
description: Germany's latest Leopard 2 variant with enhanced urban warfare capability, programmable HE ammunition, and improved protection. The gold standard for European NATO armored forces.

specialAbilities.name: Urban Warfare Package
specialAbilities.description: Roof-mounted remote weapon station, all-around cameras, and bar armor optimize the tank for close urban combat.

specialAbilities.name: Programmable HE Ammunition
specialAbilities.description: DM11 rounds can be programmed for airburst, impact, or delayed detonation, maximizing lethality against varied targets.
